zh.lifeSummary: Mary Rust於1705年7月7日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓。她於1724年12月10日與Ezekiel Herrick在美國康乃狄克州托藍德考文垂結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1760年11月3日在美國康乃狄克州托藍德考文垂享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Rust于1705年7月7日出生在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓。她于1724年12月10日与Ezekiel Herrick在美国康涅狄格州托藍德考文垂结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1760年11月3日在美国康涅狄格州托藍德考文垂享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rust
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swiss German (also Rüst): topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent elm tree, Rust (Old High German ruost), or in northern Germany for someone who lived by a resting place or halt along a route, from Middle Low German ruste ‘rest’.
German: habitational name from a place called Ruest in Mecklenburg-West Pomerania.
German: from the rare personal name Rusto (from Old High German (h)rustan ‘prepare, get ready (for military action)’.

variants.name: Russett
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): nickname from Middle English russet ‘reddish brown’ (from Old French rosset, a diminutive of rous(e) ‘red’, from Latin russus ‘red’). This may have been a nickname for someone with reddish brown hair or a ruddy complexion but in Middle English russet also denoted a kind of reddish brown coarse woolen cloth typically worn by the poor, and thus the name might have been a nickname for someone who made or sold such cloth.

variants.name: Rost
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Detlef, Manfred, Arno, Eldor, Heinrich, Heinz, Klaus, Kurt, Mathias, Otto, Ralf, Reinhart.
German: nickname for a red-haired man, from Middle High German rost ‘rust’.

German: metonymic occupational name for a limeburner or blacksmith, from Middle High German, Middle Low German rōst ‘grate, grill’ or Middle High German rōst(e) ‘fire, embers, pyre, grate’ (typically one for burning lime).

variants.name: Ruest
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Fernand, Henri, Adrien, Antoine, Armand, Auguste, Cyrille, Donat, Gaston, Gilles, Monique, Normand.
Swiss German (mainly Rüst): see Rust 1. This surname is also found in France.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Rust was born on 7 July 1705, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States. She married Ezekiel Herrick on 10 December 1724, in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 3 November 1760, in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Rust est née le 7 juillet 1705, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Elle a épousé Ezekiel Herrick le 10 décembre 1724, à Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 3 novembre 1760, à Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Rust wurde am 7. Juli 1705 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren. Sie hat am 10. Dezember 1724 in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Ezekiel Herrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 3. November 1760 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten.

Lei sposato Ezekiel Herrick il 10 dicembre 1724, nel Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Mary Rustは1705年7月7日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで生まれた。1724年12月10日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドコベントリーでEzekiel Herrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1760年11月3日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドコベントリーで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Rust(은)는 1705년 7월 7일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1724년 12월 10일 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 커븐트리에서 Ezekiel Herrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1760년 11월 3일 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 커븐트리에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Rust родилась 7 июля 1705 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ezekiel Herrick 10 декабря 1724 г. в местности ковентри, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 3 ноября 1760 г. в местности ковентри, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 55 лет.
